title: UI: chat list panel
description:
## Why
The user needs to see and navigate their conversations.

## What
- Render DMs, Groups, Spaces (with channels) in the left panel
- Sort by lastMessageAt descending; chats without messages sort last
- Show unreadCount badge on each chat entry
- Show presence dot next to DM contact names (online/away/busy/offline)
- Highlight selected chat
- Click or Enter to select a chat, loading its messages
close_reason: Superseded; replaced by issues under jmap-chat-tui-s2e (egui) and new TUI epic
